name: family-holiday-finder
description: Find and rank 15 verified family package holidays across selected Czech and Slovak travel operators.

interface.longDescription: Searches Blue Style, EXIM tours, TUI, Cedok, and optionally Hydrotour, then verifies rooms, direct flights, hotel standards, beaches, family facilities, airport-to-hotel routes, board, ratings, and prices.
defaultPrompt: Start my family holiday search and ask for my trip constraints.
